titleStmt.title: SII 27.150: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 150. (A.R. No. 272 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the Jōgi-maṇḍapa at Chauḷikēri.
This record is dated Śaka 1399 (Śaka 1400 current), Hēvaḷaṁbi, Chaitra śu. 1, (Sunday), corresponding to 1477 A.D., March 16.

It registers a gift of money (and paddy ?) to the temple of Bhairavadēva built by Ayivara [Kōṭinātha]-seṭṭi, son-in-law of Bīraṇaseṭṭi in the maṭha of Anupamanātha-voḍeya, for offerings and burning a perpetual lamp therein, by three seṭṭis whose names, however, are not clear. It startes that Paṇḍaridēva-oḍeya, son of [Viṭhappa]-Voḍeya, was governing Bārakūru-rājya under the orders of Siṅgaṇa-daṇāyaka who is stated to have been governing the country at the instance of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ śrī sarasvatyāyēṁ namaḥ śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ
nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarā
raṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1399 saṁdu
sāvirada nānūṟaneya vartamāna hēvaḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada cayitra su 1 . Ā śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa virupākṣa mahārāyaru vijayanaga
riya rājadhāniyalu samasta varnna dharmmāśramaṁgaḷanū pratipālisutta sukhasaṁkathā vinō
dadiṁdiruttihalli Ā mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda siṁgaṇadayakara rājyavanā
ḷuva kāladali A virūpākṣamahārāyara siṁgaṇadaṇāyakara nirūpadiṁda viṭhappa
Oḍeyara kumāra paṁḍaridēva Oḍeyarū bārakūru rājyavanāḷuva kāladali cauḷiyakēri
kellaṁgereya �yośānyada dikinalu Ayivaru halaru muṁdiṭṭu Anupama
nātha voḍeyara maṭhada catusīmeyoḷage le museṭṭi ya
Aṟuvara bīraṇaseṭṭiyara Aḷiya Ayivarakōṭinātha se
ṭṭiyaru tāvukaṭṭisida bhayiravadēvara dēvālyakke A bhayiravadēvari
ge Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīptige biṭṭa bāḷeya Akkiya vivara Ayivara
ṁmaḷamaga Ayivara seṭi Ātana kiṟiya magaḷu gaṇaseṭṭi
Atana kiṟiya tāyamaga seṭṭiyi mūvaru
va kāṭi ga 100 Akṣaradalu nūṟu hoṁnu yī hoṁni Oḍi prati va 1 kkaṁ
mūḍe Akkiya mānaṁ mūlada
yalū tiṁgaḷige hadineṁṭu
Digital edition of SII 27.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
